name: Nazaré
description:
Valentine are over but Nazaré wanted to find love again he fishes out to find love but the gym leader couldn't find love in the ocean until you came into his life.

You arrived at the gym but the gym trainer said that Nazaré isn't here and you must find him everywhere in the town met and find him standing on the rock at the Ebony beach by the shore,he came out of the water that you thought he is a sea monster looking scary and intimidating he saw you and have a conversation giving a cold shoulder to the stranger with you as he left going back to his gym.

You defeated him after you challenge him in the gym and won a gym badge and he gives you the TM. After defeat him winning the gym badge you stayed over at the town inn but you saw his silhouette in the moonlight, you walk up to him he have a conversation with you again about how he wants to see Kyogre Primal form underwater,you accept that you come along with him as he steering his boat you and him dive underwater as you dive with him you see Kyogre Primal form glowing in the dark for the first time as Nazaré took a photo seeing it for the first time. He thanked you as you are given a Gyradosite mega stone.

You left the Coração town going to the 7th gym as there are 2 more badges left till you go beat the elite four and the Champion of Fengshui.

Also you visited The Ebony beach again in Coração town.

My Pokémon OC Nazaré who name originated from Portuguese he is water type gym leader OC also my art because I love art

Name:Nazaré name originated from Portuguese

He/Him pronouns

Age:42

6th Gym leader, Lighthouse keeper

The Coração Oceanõ badge

Yes fish pokemon can be eaten as well.

Pokémon he used:Water and Ghost types

Pokémon team:Tentacruel,Dhelmise,Hisuian Samurott,Wishiwashi

Long Black hair with blue fade hair dye and white streaks look like the ocean waves his braided hair looks like a fish tail,tanned brown skin,hook nose,mega stone in the bottle necklace jewellery,dark blue coat with sharp fins collar necklines,swimsuit pants and shirtless,no shoes and ankle bracelet,wrinkles on his face and ribcage lines on his torso,beads belt with fish accessories,tear drops beads,blue ocean beads,gold and hooks to make him look unique,tear drop earrings

And yes he is a single dad and he lost his wife during the stormy day in the ocean and the twin daughter and son survived

Both his children are now in college and both of them are 19 years old now.
creator: Candy_sticks_zaza
